{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/253-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _Why the Binary View Is Incomplete_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _Why the Binary View Is Incomplete_
2. _The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern_
3. _What Makes a Composite Skills Agent_
4. _The Sub-Agent Registry_
5. _Configuration: How Principals Build Their Ensembles_
6. _Coordination and Disagreement Resolution_
7. _Economics of Combinatorial Replication_
8. _Seven Domains of Application_
9. _Integration with OKWF Infrastructure_
10. _Risks Specific to Composite Architectures_
11. _Open Questions_
12. _Call for Collaboration_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [211-table-of-contents|211-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.26)

* [137-table-of-contents|137-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.15)

* [211-table-of-contents|211-table-of-contents.md]

* [137-table-of-contents|137-table-of-contents.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [Table of Contents|211-table-of-contents.md] _33%_
* [1. Why the Binary View Is Incomplete|254-1-why-the-binary-view-is-incomplete.md] _33%_
* [Abstract|252-abstract.md] _29%_
* [3. What Makes a Composite Skills Agent|256-3-what-makes-a-composite-skills-agent.md] _29%_
* [Appendix C: Configuration Template Example|271-appendix-c-configuration-template-example.md] _29%_
* [Table of Contents|137-table-of-contents.md] _25%_
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md] _25%_
* [2. The Twenty-One Teachers Pattern|255-2-the-twenty-one-teachers-pattern.md] _25%_
